# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: user-service-route
        paths:
          - /api/users
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        strip_path: true
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 60
          policy: local
  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: product-service-route
        paths:
          - /api/products
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        strip_path: true
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_in_body: false
upstreams:
  - name: user-service-upstream
    hosts:
      - host: user-service-1
        port: 8080
        weight: 100
      - host: user-service-2
        port: 8080
        weight: 100
    algorithm: round-robin
  - name: product-service-upstream
    hosts:
      - host: product-service-1
        port: 8080
        weight: 100
      - host: product-service-2
        port: 8080
        weight: 100
    algorithm: round-robin
